claims.headline: Supports cognition in aging
claims.notesSentence: Meta-analysis of double-blind RCTs showed clinical benefit for cognitive impairment across global outcome measures.

source.label: PubMed
source.linkTitle: Piracetam cognitive impairment meta-analysis on PubMed

claims.headline: Improves brain energetics
claims.notesSentence: Reviewed pharmacology shows effects on membrane fluidity and mitochondrial function relevant to neuronal energy.

source.label: PubMed
source.linkTitle: Piracetam mitochondrial pharmacology review on PubMed
